Authors.value: M. Hussain, J. Mateo, K. Fizazi, F. Saad, N. Shore, S. Sandhu, K.N. Chi, O. Sartor, N. Agarwal, D. Olmos, A. Thiery-Vuillemin, P. Twardowski, G. Roubaud, M. Özgüroğlu, J. Kang, J. Burgents, C. Gresty, C. Corcoran, C.A. Adelman, and J. de Bono, for the PROfound Trial Investigators

Full Pub or Abstract.value: Survival with Olaparib in Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer. N Engl J Med 2020;383:2345-57. DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa2022485

Control Arm.value: Physician's choice of enzalutamide or abiraterone plus prednisone

HRR Mutation Status.value: Alteration in at least one of 15 prespecified HRR genes

Genes Screened.value: BRCA1, BRCA2, ATM, BRIP1, BARD1, CDK12, CHEK1, CHEK2, FANCL, PALB2, PPP2R2A, RAD51B, RAD51C, RAD51D, RAD54L

Secondary Endpoint(s).value: Overall survival, confirmed objective response rate, time to pain progression

Type of Therapy.value: Targeted therapy (PARP inhibitor) vs. hormonal therapy

Type of Combination Therapy.value: Control arm: hormonal agent plus prednisone

Prior Therapy in Any Setting.value: Previous treatment with enzalutamide, abiraterone, or both; previous taxane chemotherapy allowed

Prior Therapy in mCRPC Setting.value: Previous treatment with enzalutamide, abiraterone, or both; previous taxane chemotherapy allowed
